name: grocery-genie-marketing
description: Grocery Genie marketing landing page — vanilla HTML/CSS with a Resend-backed waitlist API.

scripts.build:icons: convert -background none -density 600 favicon.svg -resize 32x32 favicon-32.png && convert -background none -density 600 favicon.svg -resize 180x180 apple-touch-icon.png && convert -background none -density 600 favicon.svg -resize 192x192 icon-192.png && convert -background none -density 800 favicon.svg -resize 512x512 icon-512.png && convert -background none -density 200 og-image.svg -resize 1200x630 og-image.png
